ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the school's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the school is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "religious_affiliation" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the school type */,
  "educational_philosophy" TEXT /* Educational philosophy of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the school level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school level */,
  "grade_range" TEXT /* Range of grades offered by the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school feature */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., academic, extracurricular) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the feature (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school facility */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school with the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., academic, recreational) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school statistic */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school with the statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the administrator is associated with */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the administrator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "moderator_name" TEXT /* Name of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the moderator started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the moderator ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
